source.title: Why can't I claim my ATLAS from Faction Fleet?
source.author: ATMTA / Star Atlas official publisher

summary.archival_abstract: Official support article titled “Why can't I claim my ATLAS from Faction Fleet?.” This record preserves what Star Atlas Support / ATMTA publicly stated at the recorded publication time; claims about delivery, economics, or outcomes remain limited to the wording of the source.
summary.historical_value: Official evidence baseline for later reconciliation with community reporting.
summary.current_validity_warning: Official publication does not independently prove successful execution, completeness, or continued current validity.

article_text:
You need sol in your wallet to pay transaction fees, it's at least recommended to have 0,03 SOL
If you have enough sol in your wallet and you still can't claim your ATLAS please contact one of our agents using the chatbot that you will find at the bottom right of this page or join us in Discord and create a ticket, one of our moderators will take care of your issue.
